utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 6 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (with flight details and costs), accommodation (with hotel and costs), activities (with selected activities and costs), additional_services (with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all of these items. Each item is fully specified: destination (Prague, Czech Republic) is given; travel_dates (2024-06-20 to 2024-06-24) are specified; transportation includes detailed flight info and cost (€800); accommodation includes hotel name, rating, room type, location, amenities, and cost (€640); activities include one activity with type, duration, cost, and notes (€200); additional_services lists travel insurance and payment method; total_budget includes a detailed cost breakdown (flights, accommodation, activities, total, currency, remaining budget). All six required items are covered completely.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the destination 'Prague, Czech Republic'; transportation with 'Budget Airline (Economy Class)'; accommodation at 'Family Haven Hotel'; and one activity, 'City Walking Tour'. Using the ground-truth ratings: 'Prague, Czech Republic' has a rating of 7, 'Budget Airline (Economy Class)' has a rating of 6, 'Family Haven Hotel' has a rating of 9, and 'City Walking Tour' has a rating of 9. These correspond directly to the entries in the ground-truth data.
